title: Infinite Anvil Uses
description: This mod removes the "Too expensive!" feature from anvils.
body:
# Infinite Anvil Uses
This mod's primary purpose is to remove the "Too Expensive!" feature from anvils. This allows items to be worked an infinite number of times in Survival.

## Usage and Dependencies
This mod is currently only built for Fabric. In the future, it may be released for Forge. It currently only depends on the Fabric API.

## Todos
- Allow setting maximum repair costs in anvils (either via a gamerule or a config file)
- Allow alterations to how repair costs increase (either via a gamerule or a config file)
